description: FrontForge content schema registry. Runtime validation uses Zod implementations in src/content-engine/schemas/.

schemas.description: Day metadata: title, mission, topics, definition of done
Lesson blocks: headings, code, callouts, tables, accordions, tabs
Quiz questions: single/multiple choice, true-false, fill-blank, code-output, code-completion, short-answer
Build challenge: requirements, acceptance criteria, debugging scenarios
Interview prep questions with sample answers and follow-ups

platformConfig.note: dashboard.json, navigation.json, roadmap.json, course.json, settings.json, theme.json, skills.json, progress.json, achievements.json, app-config.json, blocks.json require Milestone 3+ schemas and repository loaders before creation.
